Petitioner Anna K. Antonsson
Respondent Family Court Services represented by Claire Williams

This matter comes on calendar for a small claims hearing. The court hears argument from the petitioner and the respondent submits on the papers. The court DENIES the petitioner's claim based on the legal immunity of the Family Law commissioner.

***No exhibits were received during the hearing.***
